description: Analyze ledger postings to find cost changes, then create projects/activities
endpoints: GET /ledger/posting — params: dateFrom, dateTo, accountNumberFrom, accountNumberTo, count
common_errors: Must include dateFrom and dateTo on /ledger/posting queries
Circuit breaker triggers at 10 errors — be precise with API calls
tips: PRECISE APPROACH: 1) GET /ledger/posting?dateFrom=2026-01-01&dateTo=2026-01-31&accountNumberFrom=4000&accountNumberTo=9999&count=1000 for Jan. 2) GET /ledger/posting?dateFrom=2026-02-01&dateTo=2026-02-28&accountNumberFrom=4000&accountNumberTo=9999&count=1000 for Feb. MUST do TWO separate queries, NOT one big range. 3) Sum amountGross by account.number for each month. 4) Find top 3 accounts with largest INCREASE (Feb total - Jan total). 5) For each, create_project with isInternal=true, name=EXACT account name from Tripletex (e.g. 'Lønn til ansatte', not just 'Lønn'). 6) For each project, create activity with name=SAME as project name via generic_api_call POST /project/projectActivity body {"project":{"id":PROJECT_ID},"activity":{"name":"PROJECT_NAME","activityType":"PROJECT_SPECIFIC_ACTIVITY"}}. Activity name MUST match project name, not 'General'. Do ALL ledger reads with generic_api_call. Do NOT retry failed calls.
